onboarding.candidate.cardDescription: Tell us about you so we can match you with the best offers.
onboarding.fields.dobHelper: You must be at least 18 years old.
onboarding.fields.phoneHelper: Enter your number with or without the leading 0 — we add +261 automatically.
onboarding.errors.dobMin18: You must be at least 18 years old
onboarding.languages.intro: Self-assess your level. You can also take a quick AI test — the score will be updated automatically.
onboarding.skills.intro: Add the skills that best describe what you can do. Press Enter to add.
onboarding.sectors.intro: Pick the sectors you'd like to work in. You can add your own.
onboarding.cv.intro: Upload your CV (optional). PDF, PNG, JPG or WEBP — up to 10 MB. We'll try to pre-fill your profile from it.
onboarding.cv.extractedFmt: Pre-filled {skills} skill(s) and {sectors} sector(s) from your CV. Review the earlier steps before submitting.
onboarding.cv.aiUnavailable: AI extract unavailable; you can still finish without it

marketing.home.metaTitle: MG·Work — Labour mobility between Madagascar and the Indian Ocean
marketing.home.metaDescription: A serious platform connecting Malagasy candidates with employers in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. Compliant with the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017.
marketing.home.hero.subtitle: A serious platform that connects Malagasy candidates with employers in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles.

marketing.home.trust.label: Trusted by
marketing.home.howItWorks.title: One platform, two journeys
marketing.home.howItWorks.subtitle: On the candidate side, you apply in minutes. On the employer side, you receive pre-verified profiles.
marketing.home.howItWorks.candidate.step: Identity, experience, languages, target sector. 10 minutes.
Our engine cross-references your criteria with open positions.
Documents, visa, housing: an advisor stays with you until departure.
marketing.home.howItWorks.enterprise.ste: Describe the role, skills and languages. KYC validation in 48 hours.
Each candidate is scored 0–100. PII is masked until shortlisting.
Interviews, contract, onboarding: our team secures every step.
marketing.home.pillars.title: Serious, transparent, compliant
marketing.home.pillars.verified.title: Verified profiles
marketing.home.pillars.verified.body: Identity, diplomas and authorisations are checked by our team before every match.
marketing.home.pillars.matching.title: Transparent matching
marketing.home.pillars.matching.body: Every score is explained: skills, languages, sector, geographic mobility.
marketing.home.pillars.compliance.title: Regional compliance
marketing.home.pillars.compliance.body: Mauritius DPA 2017 compliance and KYC support for employers.

marketing.home.testimonials.title: They found their place
marketing.home.testimonials.t1.quote: The support made all the difference. Documents, visa, housing — everything was ready before I left for Mauritius.
marketing.home.testimonials.t1.name: Tahiry Razafy
marketing.home.testimonials.t2.quote: We receive profiles that are already scored and verified. Our time-to-hire dropped from 6 weeks to 2.
marketing.home.testimonials.t2.name: Camille Léonard
marketing.home.testimonials.t3.quote: My first morning in Réunion, I had my contract, my housing and my residence permit. I've never felt so calm.
marketing.home.testimonials.t3.name: Naina Andriana

marketing.home.faq.title: Your questions, our answers
marketing.home.faq.q1.a: No. Profile creation, matching and administrative support are entirely free for candidates. Our revenue comes from employers.
marketing.home.faq.q2.q: How long does it take to find a job?
marketing.home.faq.q2.a: Average time from signup to departure is 14 days. It varies depending on the sector, your profile and the hiring company's pace.
marketing.home.faq.q3.q: How do you verify candidate identities?
marketing.home.faq.q3.a: ID, diplomas and authorisations are checked by our team in Antananarivo within 48 hours. No offers are forwarded until verification is complete.
marketing.home.faq.q4.a: Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. We're evaluating other Indian Ocean countries based on demand from partner employers.
marketing.home.faq.q5.a: An MG·Work advisor stays with every candidate for the first 6 months on site: housing, contract, integration. If something goes wrong, we step in.
marketing.home.cta.title: Ready to take the leap?
marketing.home.cta.body: Sign up in 5 minutes. No commitment, no hidden fees.
marketing.candidats.metaDescription: Apply to verified jobs in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. Free signup, dedicated advisor, end-to-end support until departure.
marketing.candidats.hero.subtitle: Apply to verified jobs in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. A dedicated advisor supports you from application to your first day at work.
marketing.candidats.steps.title: 5 steps, fully supported
marketing.candidats.steps.step1.title: Sign up
marketing.candidats.steps.step1.body: Account created in 5 minutes, SMS verification.
marketing.candidats.steps.step2.title: Profile
marketing.candidats.steps.step3.title: Verification
marketing.candidats.steps.step3.body: Identity and diplomas checked within 48 hours.
marketing.candidats.steps.step4.title: Matches
marketing.candidats.steps.step4.body: Offers ranked and scored against your criteria.
marketing.candidats.steps.step5.title: Departure
marketing.candidats.steps.step5.body: Visa, housing, contract — supported until D-1.
marketing.candidats.benefits.title: What MG·Work changes
marketing.candidats.benefits.subtitle: A platform built for Malagasy candidates, not a copy of a European job board.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b1.title: Free, always
marketing.candidats.benefits.b2.title: Verified jobs
marketing.candidats.benefits.b2.body: Every employer goes through our KYC.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b3.title: Dedicated advisor
marketing.candidats.benefits.b3.body: A real person you can reach, in French or Malagasy.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b4.title: Transparent score
marketing.candidats.benefits.b4.body: You know why you match — or why you don't.
marketing.candidats.sample.description: Permanent · €1,800/month net · Visa, flight and housing covered. Healthcare assistant diploma required. English B1.
marketing.candidats.stories.title: They made the move
marketing.candidats.stories.t1.quote: I was nervous about leaving, especially the paperwork. My advisor handled everything. Today I work in Mauritius and send a bit home each month.
marketing.candidats.stories.t1.name: Tahiry Razafy
marketing.candidats.stories.t2.quote: It's the only platform where the score is explained. I improved my profile (English, certifications) and went from 64 to 84 in two months.
marketing.candidats.stories.t2.name: Naina Andriana
marketing.candidats.faq.title: Your questions
marketing.candidats.faq.q1.a: Nothing. The platform is entirely free for candidates: profile creation, matching, administrative support, departure follow-up. Our revenue comes from employers who hire through MG·Work.
marketing.candidats.faq.q2.a: On average 14 days between signup and departure. The timeline depends on your sector, document verification and the hiring company's schedule.
marketing.candidats.faq.q3.q: What if I don't speak English?
marketing.candidats.faq.q3.a: Many positions are open to French-only speakers. For roles requiring English, we offer quick tests and every listing clearly states the level required.
marketing.candidats.faq.q4.q: Who handles the visa and housing?
marketing.candidats.faq.q4.a: The hiring company covers the visa and the flight. Housing is provided or subsidised depending on the role. Your MG·Work advisor coordinates every step until you arrive.
marketing.candidats.cta.title: Your next job is waiting.
marketing.candidats.cta.body: Create your profile in 5 minutes. Free, no commitment.
marketing.entreprises.metaDescription: Hire from Madagascar with confidence: verified and scored profiles, employer KYC in 48 hours, Mauritius DPA 2017 compliance.
marketing.entreprises.hero.subtitle: Receive pre-verified, scored profiles. We handle identity, diplomas, work permits and onboarding.
marketing.entreprises.why.title: International hiring, without the risk
marketing.entreprises.why.w1.title: Compliance included
marketing.entreprises.why.w1.body: Employer KYC, candidate identity verification, work authorisations. Everything is traced and audit-ready.
marketing.entreprises.why.w2.title: Explained matching
marketing.entreprises.why.w2.body: You see the score, but also the reasons: skills, languages, sector, mobility. No black box.
marketing.entreprises.why.w3.title: Local team
marketing.entreprises.why.w3.body: Our team in Antananarivo and Port-Louis follows every case — not a chatbot, a human.
marketing.entreprises.process.title: From job posting to day one
marketing.entreprises.process.step2.body: Job description written with you, multilingual.
marketing.entreprises.process.step4.body: Visa, contract, travel: we handle it.
marketing.entreprises.cases.title: They hire with MG·Work
marketing.entreprises.cases.c1.quote: We had a problematic receptionist turnover. MG·Work delivered a stable team in 4 months.
marketing.entreprises.cases.c2.quote: Post-departure follow-up changes everything: our newcomers stay, unlike with our historic channels.

marketing.conformite.metaDescription: Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017 compliance, PII masked by default, regional hosting. Compliance by construction.
marketing.conformite.hero.subtitle: MG·Work is compliant with the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017. Every data flow — candidate, employer, payment — is traced, encrypted and auditable.
marketing.conformite.pillars.title: What protects candidates and employers
marketing.conformite.pillars.p1.title: Data minimisation
marketing.conformite.pillars.p1.body: We collect only what is strictly necessary for matching and hiring. Sensitive documents (passport, medical) are deleted 90 days after the hire.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p2.title: PII masked by default
marketing.conformite.pillars.p2.body: Candidate names, addresses and photos are masked to employers until a shortlist has been initiated. You only see what helps you decide.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p3.title: Full audit log
marketing.conformite.pillars.p3.body: Every access to candidate data is logged: who, when, why. Candidates can view their access log from their account.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p4.title: Regional hosting
marketing.conformite.pillars.p4.body: All data is stored in Port-Louis and replicated to Saint-Denis. No data leaves the Indian Ocean region without an explicit request.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.title: What happens, step by step
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s1.body: The candidate enters their data. Explicit consent per use case.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s2.body: Identity and diplomas checked by our team. Documents encrypted at rest.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s3.body: The engine computes a score based on weighted, auditable criteria.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s4.body: PII is revealed to the employer after shortlist acceptance.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s5.body: Contract signed. Sensitive documents are deleted within 90 days.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s6.body: Minimum data retained for 5 years for fiscal compliance, then deleted.
marketing.conformite.dpo.title: Have a question or a report?
marketing.conformite.dpo.body: Our DPO answers any access, rectification or deletion request within 72 business hours.
marketing.conformite.faq.title: Compliance & security
marketing.conformite.faq.q1.a: In Port-Louis (Mauritius), with replication to Saint-Denis (Réunion). No data leaves the Indian Ocean region without an explicit, logged request.
marketing.conformite.faq.q2.q: How long do you keep my documents?
marketing.conformite.faq.q2.a: Sensitive documents (passport, medical) are deleted 90 days after the hire. Minimum data needed for fiscal compliance is kept for 5 years, then deleted.
marketing.conformite.faq.q3.a: Only the employers you apply to, and only after you accept a shortlist. Name, address and photo remain masked until then.
marketing.conformite.faq.q4.q: How do I delete my account?
marketing.conformite.faq.q4.a: From your dashboard under Settings, or by emailing dpo@mg-work.com. Deletion is effective within 72 business hours, excluding data we are legally required to keep.
marketing.tarifs.metaDescription: Always free for candidates. Employer plans tailored to each hiring cadence.
marketing.tarifs.hero.subtitle: Always free for candidates. Billed to employers only.
marketing.tarifs.t1.name: Starter
marketing.tarifs.t2.name: Business
marketing.tarifs.t3.name: Enterprise
marketing.tarifs.matrix.title: Every feature, in detail
marketing.tarifs.faq.title: Pricing questions
marketing.tarifs.faq.q1.a: A percentage of the hired candidate's annual gross salary, billed only when the hire is confirmed. It's our alignment of interests: we win when you hire successfully.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q2.q: Can I change plans during the year?
marketing.tarifs.faq.q2.a: Yes, at any time. Upgrading takes effect immediately; downgrading applies at the next billing cycle.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q3.a: Never. The platform is entirely free for candidates. Our revenue comes solely from employers hiring through MG·Work.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q4.a: Monthly or annual billing, by card or SEPA transfer. Success fees are billed when a hire is confirmed, separately from the subscription.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q5.a: None for monthly plans — cancel any time. Annual plans commit to 12 months in exchange for a 15% discount.
marketing.tarifs.cta.title: Start with 3 free profiles.
marketing.tarifs.cta.body: No card required. Personalised demo within 48 hours.
